'''Bravo Four''' was the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] given to a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]]' [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Flight]] during the last [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

[[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]' [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Rya Kirsch]] served as Bravo Four at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], in which he participated and was [[Death/Legends|killed]].

*{{Film|I}} <small>{{1st}}</small>
